name: Spareribs with Sauerkraut
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the ribs with salt and pepper.
2. In a large bowl, combine sauerkraut with the remaining ingredients: carrots, tomato juice, brown sugar, salt, pepper, apple, and caraway seeds.
3. Place the seasoned ribs on top of the sauerkraut mixture in a flat baking pan.
4. Cover the pan tightly and bake at 400 to 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours. For best results, pre-bake the ribs uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes to remove excess grease and juices before covering and baking again.
